subgoals.description: Search for venues in broader areas (e.g., Old Town, New Town, Edinburgh) to find a valid venue_id
subgoals.success_criterion: Search returns at least one venue with a valid venue_id

subgoals.description: Reduce party size requirement and search again for venues
subgoals.success_criterion: Search returns at least one venue with a valid venue_id

subgoals.description: Increase budget and search again for venues
subgoals.success_criterion: Search returns at least one venue with a valid venue_id
